title: AML issues on CO after processing / wire deposit
body_markdown:
**Title**: AML issues on CO after processing
**Regulation Scope**: FCA, CySEC, FinCEN, ASIC
**Status**: Pending Compliance Approval
**Owner**: Gryban Elena

## AML issues on CO / wire deposit

Payment processing team / MIMO / AML follow below steps for handling vendor requests
about CO (cash-out) and wire-deposit AML reviews. Procedural; no table references.

Vendors: Powercash, Worldpay/Ideal. Email routing to ops-paymentsexec@etoro.com,
amlcy@etoro.com, opsamlmonitoring@etoro.com.
